mapper.select: SELECT p.id , p.code , p.name , p.spec , p.purchase_unit , p.unit , p.product_group_id , p.product_type_id , p.product_attribute_id , p.is_active , s.name AS supplier_name FROM product p JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.code = #{code}

SELECT p.id , p.code , p.name , p.spec , p.purchase_unit , p.unit , p.product_group_id , p.product_type_id , p.product_attribute_id , p.is_active , s.name AS supplier_name FROM product p JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT p.id , p.code , p.name , p.spec , p.purchase_unit , p.unit , p.product_group_id , p.product_type_id , p.product_attribute_id , p.is_active , s.name AS supplier_name FROM product p JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%')

SELECT p.id , p.code , p.name , p.spec , p.purchase_unit , p.unit , p.product_group_id , p.product_type_id , p.product_attribute_id , p.purchase_price , p.sale_price , s.name AS supplier_name FROM product p JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
